title: Curaleaf Reports $1.34 Billion in 2024 Revenue
text: Curaleaf Holdings reported full year 2024 revenue of $1.34 billion despite facing industry-wide price compression of 14%. The company achieved an adjusted gross margin of 48%, driven by efficiency and productivity gains. The company reported $163 million in operating cash flow and $70 million in free cash flow from continuing operations for the full year. International operations grew 70% year-over-year, surpassing the $100 million revenue milestone. This strong international performance helped offset domestic market challenges caused by price compression and illicit market competition. The company improved adjusted EBITDA margins by 160 basis points to 48% for the year. Retail revenue declined 11% year-over-year as the company faced significant price compression in Pennsylvania, Illinois, and New Jersey. However, wholesale revenue increased 23% year-over-year to $82 million in Q4, showing strength in that channel.
